headline: AI chipmaker Cerebras namedropped by Oracle, alongside Nvidia and AMD
summary: A Cerebras deal from one of the world's top cloud providers could be a big boon for a company that's trying to hit the public market.

headline: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) Expands Support for Sovereign Artificial Intelligence Platforms
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) is one of the 11 Best Affordable Growth Stocks to Buy Now. On March 2, Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) expanded support for infrastructure solutions powering sovereign artificial intelligence platforms and Radio Access Networks. The company has introduced three new systems tailored to meet the unique requirements of telecom networks […]

headline: Super Micro Stock Plunges 49%: Buy the Dip or Stay Away?
summary: Despite triple-digit revenue growth in Q2, Super Micro stock is still down about 49% from its 52-week high.

headline: Nvidia makes 'significant investment' in Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab
summary: As part of the partnership, Thinking Machines Lab has also agreed to deploy at least one gigawatt of Nvidia's Vera Rubin systems.
